kit_request_details: Ikhithi ngayinye yebhizinisi le-Bitcoin ifaka amaphamfulethi amabili ukuze kube lula ukuthola ibhizinisi lendawo ukuba lamukele i-Bitcoin.
kit_enter_address: Faka ikheli lakho lokuthumela bese sithumela ikhithi ye-Bitcoin Business Kit yamahhala ngemvilophu emhlophe. Idatha yekheli iyasuswa ngemuva kokuthi ikhithi yakho yamahhala ithunyelwe.
kit_print_details: Ungabamba iqhaza ngokuphrinta amaphamfulethi akho, noma ngabe uhlala kuphi! Ungathumela futhi amabhizinisi kwikhithi yethu yebhizinisi yedijithali ukugwema ukuphrinta noma yini.
kit_resources: IKHITHI NGAYINYE IXHUMANA NALEZI ZINSIZAKALO ZAMAHHALA
